Our Story

A Malaysian heritage built over nine decades

From a small enterprise in 1934 to a publicly listed group — TGL Corp is one of Malaysia's most enduring apparel distribution businesses.

90+
Years in business
12+
Active brands
2
National offices
8+
Licensed IPs
Company history

How we grew

Teo Guan Lee (TGL) began as a small enterprise dealing in general merchandise in 1934. Over the decades, it diversified into the distribution of branded and licensed baby, children's, and adult wear — growing its presence across major department stores throughout East and West Malaysia.

Today, as a publicly listed corporation on Bursa Malaysia, TGL Corp manages a portfolio of four home-grown brands and over eight internationally licensed characters, serving Malaysian families at every stage of childhood.

Bursa Malaysia (KLSE) ListedTeo Guan Lee Corporation Berhad — subject to full corporate governance and continuous disclosure obligations.
TGL Corp Headquarters — Prai, Penang
Timeline

Our journey

1934
Founded as a general merchandise enterprisePenang, Malaysia
1980s
Expanded into branded apparel distributionNationwide department store presence
1990s
Launched home brands KikiLala and KIKOChildren's wear becomes core business
2000s
Secured international licensing agreementsCartoon Network, Nickelodeon & more
Today
Publicly listed on Bursa Malaysia4 home brands · 8+ licensed IPs · 2 offices
Core values

What we stand for

Integrity
We operate with transparency and honesty in all business dealings — with partners, customers, and shareholders alike.
Quality
Every product under the TGL Corp umbrella meets high standards of material quality, design, and safety for families.
Growth
We reinvest in our brands, our people, and our communities — building a business that grows sustainably for the long term.

Our Portfolio

Brands that families trust

From newborn essentials to licensed character wear — our portfolio covers every stage of childhood, available in stores and online nationwide.

Children's wear
KikiLala
Playful, colourful everyday wear for infants and young children. Loved for its vibrant designs and comfortable fits — a staple in Malaysian households.
Shopee → Lazada →
Kids fashion
KIKO
Stylish, comfortable clothing for kids who want to express themselves. A long-standing favourite in major Malaysian department stores across the country.
Shopee → Lazada →
Infant & toddler
Cuddles
Soft, gentle essentials designed for the earliest years. Trusted by parents for quality materials and safe construction from day one.
Shopee → Lazada →
Premium wear
Pronic
Elevated everyday basics for families who value quality materials and refined design — at accessible price points for the modern Malaysian family.
Shopee → Lazada →
